---
title: "Digital Humanities Bern"
title-block: false
sidebar: false
listing:
  - id: blog
    contents: content
    type: grid
    sort: "date desc"
    include:
      categories: Post
  - id: events
    contents:
      - upcoming-events.yml
    type: table
    categories: false
    sort: "event-date asc"
    sort-ui: false
    filter-ui: false
    fields: [event-date, title, location, author]
    field-display-names:
      event-date: 'Date'
      title: 'Title'
      location: 'Location'
      author: 'Organizer'
  - id: past-events
    contents:
      - past-events.yml
    type: table
    categories: false
    sort: "event-date desc"
    fields: [event-date, title, location, author]
    field-display-names:
      event-date: 'Date'
      title: 'Title'
      location: 'Location'
      author: 'Organizer'
  - id: projects
    contents: content
    type: grid
    sort: "date desc"
    include:
      categories: Project
---

::: {.home-hero}
# Digital Humanities Bern

We are a research and teaching unit at the University of Bern, connecting humanities scholarship with digital methods. We support projects, services, and training that make cultural data accessible, reusable, and impactful.

::: {.hero-actions}
[Explore Projects](content/projects/index.qmd){.hero-cta .hero-cta-primary}
[View Services](content/services/index.qmd){.hero-cta .hero-cta-secondary}
:::
:::

::: {.home-section}
## News & Updates

::: {#blog}
:::
:::

::: {.home-section .is-alt}
## Events

::: {#events}
:::

<details>
<summary>Past Events</summary>

::: {#past-events}
:::

</details>
:::

::: {.home-section}
## Projects

::: {#projects}
:::
:::
